title: Who Was Amos?
text: God called Amos to trek north to the city of Bethel to start announcing God's word to the people. This book is a collection of his sermons, poems, and visions uttered over the years.

title: Historical Context
text: Amos preached during the reign of Jeroboam II (around 760 BC), a time of wealth for Israel but deep corruption and injustice.

title: Purpose of the Book
text: The book of Amos warns Israel of coming judgment due to their oppression of the poor, idolatry, and hypocrisy in worship.
